mapper.select: select id, user_id, order_id, wx_order_id, alipay_order_id, is_check, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time from order_pay_type where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0

select id, user_id, order_id, wx_order_id, alipay_order_id, is_check, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time,status from order_pay_type where order_id= #{orderId} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into order_pay_type(id, user_id, order_id, wx_order_id, alipay_order_id, is_check,retry_count, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values (#{id}, #{userId}, #{orderId}, #{wxOrderId}, #{alipayOrderId}, #{isCheck},#{retryCount}, #{isDeleted}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into order_pay_type(id,user_id, order_id, wx_order_id, alipay_order_id, is_check, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.userId}, #{entity.orderId}, #{entity.wxOrderId}, #{entity.alipayOrderId}, #{entity.isCheck}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into order_pay_type(id,user_id, order_id, wx_order_id, alipay_order_id, is_check, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.userId}, #{entity.orderId}, #{entity.wxOrderId}, #{entity.alipayOrderId}, #{entity.isCheck}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update user_id = values(user_id), order_id = values(order_id), wx_order_id = values(wx_order_id), alipay_order_id = values(alipay_order_id), is_check = values(is_check), is_deleted = values(is_deleted), create_user = values(create_user), update_user = values(update_user), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time)
mapper.update: update order_pay_type set retry_count = retry_count + 1 where order_id = #{orderId}
update order_pay_type set is_check = 1 where order_id = #{orderId}
